name: rapierphysicsplugin
description: shared code for rapier client and server

scripts.version:sync: node -e "const v=require('./package.json').version;const fs=require('fs');const pkgs=fs.readdirSync('packages').filter(d=>fs.statSync('packages/'+d).isDirectory());pkgs.forEach(p=>{const f='packages/'+p+'/package.json';const j=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(f));j.version=v;for(const dep of ['dependencies','devDependencies','peerDependencies']){if(j[dep]){for(const k of Object.keys(j[dep])){if(k.startsWith('@rapierphysicsplugin/')){j[dep][k]=v}}}}fs.writeFileSync(f,JSON.stringify(j,null,2)+'\n')});const rf='./package.json';const rj=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(rf));if(rj.dependencies){for(const k of Object.keys(rj.dependencies)){if(k.startsWith('@rapierphysicsplugin/')){rj.dependencies[k]=v}}}fs.writeFileSync(rf,JSON.stringify(rj,null,2)+'\n')"
scripts.publish:all: yarn version:sync && yarn build && yarn workspaces foreach -A --no-private npm publish --access public && npm publish --access public
